sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Psyence Group Inc. Announces Amendment to Amalgamation Agreement with GoldCoast Resource Corp.
feed.summary: Psyence Group Inc. has announced an amendment to its amalgamation agreement with GoldCoast Resource Corp., primarily affecting the formula for the consolidation of Psyence Shares. This revision accounts for lapsed time and aims to reflect the relative equity values of both companies at closing, with the final consolidation ratio dependent on variables determined before closing. The transaction, still subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, is expected to see Psyence continue as the resulting issuer, carrying on GoldCoast's business of near-shore mineral exploration.

feed.title: Climb Global Solutions Announces Board Change as Director Retires
feed.summary: Climb Global Solutions (CLMB) announced that director Gerri Gold will retire after the 2026 annual meeting and will not seek re-election. Her departure is not due to any disagreement, and the board plans to reduce its size from five to four directors. This change is considered a routine governance streamlining with limited immediate impact on the company's strategic direction.

feed.title: First Trust MISL ETF Becomes Strategic Choice for Defense Investors
feed.summary: The First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ETF (MISL) is highlighted as a strategic investment for defense due to its focus on critical weapons systems and munitions. Analysts predict sustained demand for defense stocks for over a decade, driven by the need to replenish depleted global stockpiles. Although MISL's recent performance has been flat, its long-term potential is strong because of its alignment with future Department of Defense requirements.

feed.title: Moderna shares slide as traders digest recent EU vaccine clearance and refocus on funding/earnings overhangs
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) shares dropped 4.0% today, likely due to a "buy the rumor, sell the news" dynamic following recent EU vaccine clearance and renewed investor focus on the company's cash burn and upcoming earnings. The stock movement also reflects concerns over the financial implications of Moderna advancing influenza programs despite reduced U.S. government support. Insider selling and mixed institutional investor activity further contribute to the cautious sentiment.

feed.title: Lee Enterprises Appoints Bekke CEO, Rinehults CFO
feed.summary: Lee Enterprises has appointed Nathan Bekke as CEO and Joshua Rinehults as CFO, formalizing their interim roles after a nationwide search. Both executives will receive cash-and-equity-based compensation packages designed to align their incentives with company performance and strategic goals. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, currently rates LEE as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite some constructive earnings takeaways and moderately supportive technicals.

feed.title: Insider Sell: James Gantt Sells Shares of Manhattan Associates Inc (MANH)
feed.summary: James Gantt, Executive Vice President at Manhattan Associates Inc (MANH), sold 7,300 shares of the company on April 24, 2026, reducing his total holdings to 60,815 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of insider selling at MANH, with no insider buys in the past year. Despite the selling, the stock is considered significantly undervalued based on its GF Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.53.

feed.title: Lake Shore Bancorp Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Lake Shore Bancorp (NASDAQ: LSBK) has declared a cash dividend of $0.09 per share, payable on May 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026. This move reflects the bank's commitment to shareholder returns and confidence in its financial stability. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates LSBK as "Neutral" due to improving financial performance and a de-risked balance sheet, offset by inconsistent free cash flow and bearish technical signals.

feed.title: Marathon Digital (NASDAQ:MARA) Stock Price Down 1.4% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Marathon Digital's stock (NASDAQ:MARA) fell 1.4% to $11.64 on Friday after the company reported a significant quarterly earnings miss, posting ($4.52) EPS against an estimated ($0.23), and lower-than-expected revenue. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $19, but several recent downgrades and initiation at "Underweight" by Morgan Stanley. Additionally, company insiders, including the General Counsel and CFO, have sold a total of 172,605 shares in the past 90 days.

feed.title: The npm Threat Landscape: Attack Surface and Mitigations
feed.summary: The npm ecosystem, particularly since the September 2025 Shai-Hulud worm incident, has become a high-consequence threat landscape with an aggressive acceleration in supply chain compromises. Attacks have evolved from simple typosquatting to systematic campaigns employing wormable propagation, infrastructure-level persistence, and multi-stage payloads. The article details a recent Shai-Hulud-related campaign by TeamPCP, illustrating its sophisticated credential harvesting, exfiltration, and npm worm propagation techniques, and provides guidance for mitigation and protection.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions Inc (SWKS) Stock Up 3.4% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 79/100
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions Inc (SWKS) shares recently rose 3.4%, and the stock is currently trading 25.1% below its GF Value™ estimate of $85.02, categorizing it as "Modestly Undervalued." Despite strong financial health and profitability (GF Score™ of 79/100), its growth metrics show weakness (3/10). No insider transactions have been reported in the last three months, suggesting a neutral outlook from management.

feed.title: Nasdaq notifies Sports Entertainment Gaming Global of late annual report filing
feed.summary: Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corp (NASDAQ:SEGG) has received a notice from Nasdaq for failing to timely file its annual report (Form 10-K) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company, facing a "WEAK" financial health score and a 92% stock decline over the past year, has 60 days to submit a compliance plan. SEGG plans to submit the plan and file the 10-K as soon as practicable.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams shareholders approve all management proposals at annual meeting
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) shareholders approved all management proposals at their 2026 Annual Meeting. This included the election of nine director nominees, advisory approval of executive compensation, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and an amendment to reduce the threshold for shareholders to call a special meeting to 25% ownership. The company, which has raised its dividend for 33 consecutive years, also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Stock Price Up 2.4% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) saw its stock price rise by 2.4% after analysts highlighted its potential benefits from AI networking demand, particularly Google's "Virgo" architecture and expanded AI-networking total addressable market. Despite this bullish sentiment and strong Q4 earnings beat, significant insider selling, including by CEO Jayshree Ullal, has created concerns and could lead to short-term selling pressure. The company maintains a rich valuation and analyst reports show a consensus "Buy" rating with an average target price of $177.83.

feed.title: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) Trading Down 1.1% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) saw its stock price drop 1.1% after receiving a Complete Response Letter from the FDA regarding trenibotulinumtoxinE due to manufacturing concerns, delaying its commercialization. Despite this setback, the company is investing in a new $1.4 billion drug-manufacturing campus and has entered a licensing deal for pain medicines, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price around $253, viewing it as a dividend opportunity. Insider selling was reported, with two executives reducing their holdings in the company.

feed.title: IDEAYA Biosciences Advances Precision Oncology with AI Discovery
feed.summary: IDEAYA Biosciences (IDYA) is strengthening its position in the biotechnology sector, specializing in synthetic lethality-based cancer therapies. Wedbush Securities increased its price target for IDEAYA from $52 to $58 following positive Phase 2/3 OptimUM-02 trial results. The company is also advancing its IDE574 program, an early-stage clinical trial for a first-in-class small-molecule therapy targeting epigenetic markers critical for cancer cell survival, and uses AI for drug discovery.

feed.title: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) Trading Down 1.6% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) saw its shares drop by 1.6% on Friday, trading at $46.46 with below-average volume, signaling weak short-term technicals ahead of its Q1 earnings report. Despite increasing its quarterly dividend to yield approximately 6.1% and making strategic moves in 5G expansion and legal victories against competitors, analysts remain cautious due to wireless revenue pressure and intense competition. The company's Q1 earnings are scheduled for April 27th, which will likely dictate its near-term stock performance.

feed.title: JELD-WEN Shareholders Approve 2026 Equity Plan and Directors
feed.summary: JELD-WEN Holding, Inc. shareholders approved the 2026 Omnibus Equity Plan, reserving three million shares for incentive compensation, and re-elected all directors at their 2026 Annual Meeting. They also endorsed executive pay and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for 2026, indicating strong support for the company's governance and compensation practices. Despite this, Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates JELD as Neutral due to weak financial performance and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Yorkville Acquisition Names CFO Troy Rillo as CEO
feed.summary: Yorkville Acquisition Corp. announced that its CEO, Kevin McGurn, resigned on April 22, 2026, with no reported disputes. Concurrently, CFO Troy Rillo was appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer, combining the top executive and finance roles. Rillo's extensive background across Yorkville Advisors and affiliated entities is expected to ensure strategic and financial continuity for the company.

feed.title: La Rosa Holdings (NASDAQ: LRHC) restates 2024 results on revenue error
feed.summary: La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC) announced it will restate its 2024 annual financial statements and quarterly reports for periods from March 2024 through September 2025 due to a revenue recognition error. The company misclassified certain property management fee revenue, recording it on a gross basis instead of as an agent under ASC 606, leading to a $10.8 million reduction in 2024 gross property management fee revenue and a corresponding reduction in cost of revenue. While gross profit dollars remain unchanged, the restatement will cause the gross margin percentage for 2024 to increase from 8.57% to 10.14%.

feed.title: Laser Photonics (NASDAQ: LASE) registers 2.9M warrant shares for resale
feed.summary: Laser Photonics (NASDAQ: LASE) has filed an S-1 registration statement for the resale of 2,900,472 shares of common stock. These shares are issuable upon the exercise of Series A-3, A-4 inducement warrants, and placement agent warrants held by existing security holders. The company will not receive proceeds from the resale of these shares, but may receive cash if the warrants are exercised for cash at $1.08 per share.

feed.title: How much capex AES Andes may deploy in 2026-29
feed.summary: Rating agency Fitch has affirmed AES Andes' 'BBB-' debt rating, with a key assumption being that the regional generator's total capital expenditure will reach US$260mn between 2026 and 2029. This capex includes maintenance, and expansion projects are expected to be financed through cash flow, new contracts, and partnerships. AES Andes employs an "asset-light" strategy, selling projects to an indirectly owned company and then purchasing power through long-term agreements, which limits direct capex.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger Projected to Grow Profits Ahead of Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger (GWW) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before the market opens on May 7, with analysts projecting a 3.5% increase in diluted EPS to $10.20 compared to the previous year. Despite a strong profit outlook and consistent historical performance, GWW shares have underperformed broader market indices over the past year due to margin pressures and a deceleration in earnings momentum. The majority of analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating on the stock, reflecting caution amidst economic complexities.

feed.title: eBay shares fall 5.3% as traders de-risk ahead of next week’s earnings
feed.summary: eBay Inc. (EBAY) shares dropped 5.3% due to pre-earnings de-risking as investors took profits ahead of the company's Q1 2026 earnings report scheduled for April 29, 2026. The move aligns with broader volatility in the large-cap internet sector, with no specific company-level news driving the decline. Insider trading data shows significant sales by executives, while institutional investors had mixed activity in Q4 2025.

feed.title: LZ Technology (NASDAQ: LZMH) seeks 300-vote Class A shares and big recap
feed.summary: LZ Technology Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: LZMH) is proposing significant changes to its voting and share structure, including increasing the voting power of Class A ordinary shares from 10 to 300 votes per share, while Class B shares would maintain one vote. The company also plans to expand authorized capital from 2 billion to 80 billion ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.000025, followed by an initial 20-for-1 share consolidation and further consolidations up to a cumulative 5,000:1 over three years. These proposals aim to provide stronger insider voting power and a flexible share structure, and will be voted on at upcoming Class B and extraordinary general meetings scheduled for May 6, 2026.

feed.title: St. Louis Post-Dispatch owner Lee Enterprises names CEO, CFO
feed.summary: Lee Enterprises, owner of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch, has appointed Nathan Bekke as CEO and Joshua Rinehults as CFO. This announcement follows the Iowa publisher's recent debt refinancing and the addition of a Stifel executive to its board. Chairman David Hoffmann has previously indicated a potential relocation of the company's headquarters to St. Louis.

feed.title: PNC Financial Shareholders Approve 2026 Equity Incentive Plan
feed.summary: PNC Financial shareholders approved the company's 2026 Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan on April 22, 2026, authorizing 28 million new common shares for various equity-based awards. Investors also re-elected all 13 director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor, and approved executive compensation. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates PNC as Neutral, citing strong technical momentum and a constructive 2026 outlook balanced by weakened financial-quality signals.

feed.title: Victory for Goats! Macy’s, Bloomingdales, and TJX Ditch Mohair After PETA Push
feed.summary: Macy's Inc., which includes Bloomingdale's, and TJX Companies (parent of TJ Maxx, Marshalls, and HomeGoods) have announced they will no longer sell mohair products. This decision follows a PETA exposé revealing severe animal cruelty in the mohair industry, with goats being brutalized and left with injuries. PETA is sending goat-shaped vegan chocolates to the companies in thanks and is urging other retailers, including H&M, to follow suit.

feed.title: Lucid Diagnostics (LUCD) CMO reports 650K restricted shares and 100K options
feed.summary: Lucid Diagnostics Chief Medical Officer, Victoria Lee Tou-ho, has filed an amended Form 3, disclosing her equity holdings. The report details 650,000 restricted shares of Common Stock with varying vesting dates through May 2029, dependent on service requirements. Additionally, she holds an employee stock option for 100,000 shares with an exercise price of $1.25, expiring in 2034.

feed.title: Target Orders Relocation to HQ for Merchandising Teams
feed.summary: Target Corp. is mandating the relocation of approximately 150 remote merchandising team employees to its Minneapolis headquarters. This move is part of the company's efforts to enhance in-person collaboration, sharpen its focus on style, and accelerate work under the new CEO, Michael Fiddelke. Employees can either accept relocation assistance or leave the company with separation benefits.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Realty Income (O) Extending Its Long Dividend Streak Amid Net Lease Optimism
feed.summary: Realty Income Corporation (O) has declared its 670th consecutive monthly dividend, reinforcing its reputation as a consistent income producer. The article discusses Barclays' "Goldilocks" view on net lease REITs, Realty Income's reliable income while highlighting potential challenges like acquisition funding, increasing European market exposure, and associated foreign currency and regulatory risks. Despite some varied fair value estimates among investors, the company's strong dividend and strategic partnerships like the Apollo joint venture continue to shape its investment narrative.

feed.title: Edison International Expands Board, Reinforces Governance Oversight
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) announced that shareholders re-elected eleven directors and added M. Susan Hardwick as an independent board member at its April 23, 2026 annual meeting. Shareholders also ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor and approved the executive compensation program, while rejecting a shareholder proposal on equity retention. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rated EIX as Neutral, citing mixed financials with strong profitability but negative free cash flow, and noted wildfire-related uncertainty as a meaningful risk despite positive valuation and yield.

feed.title: Over 200,000 Heated Socks Sold at Costco Recalled After Reports of Burns
feed.summary: Over 200,000 pairs of 32 Degrees heated socks sold exclusively at Costco have been recalled due to reports of first- and second-degree burns. The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission stated that the battery-powered socks, manufactured in China, can cause burns from heat, friction, moisture, and pressure during high-intensity activities. Consumers are advised to return the socks to Costco for a full refund.

feed.title: Autodesk Adds New Independent Director, Updates Board Composition
feed.summary: Autodesk (ADSK) has nominated Pearson CEO Omar Abbosh as a new independent director to its board, citing his expertise in AI and technology transformation. Concurrently, long-time director Stephen Milligan will not seek re-election. Following these changes, the company's 11-member board will maintain a strong independent majority with 10 independent directors.

feed.title: Perceptive lifts MeiraGTx (NASDAQ: MGTX) ownership to 12.6% with warrants
feed.summary: Perceptive Advisors and its affiliates now beneficially own 12.6% of MeiraGTx (NASDAQ: MGTX) ordinary shares, totaling 11,742,117 shares. This stake includes a recent purchase of 555,555 shares at $9.00 each on April 17, 2026, and warrants for 700,000 shares which had their exercise price adjusted from $15.00-$20.00 to $8.00 per share on March 25, 2026. This significant ownership combines equity and credit exposure, underlining Perceptive's ongoing investment in MeiraGTx.

feed.title: AMG (NYSE: AMG) officer Cheerag B. Patel reports 39,659 common shares
feed.summary: Cheerag B. Patel, Head of Affiliate Engagement at Affiliated Managers Group, Inc. (AMG), has filed a Form 3 indicating his initial beneficial ownership of 39,659 shares of Common Stock. This filing, which occurred on April 24, 2026, reports direct ownership with no immediate buy or sell transactions disclosed. The report provides transparency regarding his stake in the company and helps assess insider confidence.

feed.title: Life Time Group Shareholders Back Board and Governance Plans
feed.summary: Life Time Group Holdings (LTH) shareholders recently voted to re-elect five Class II directors and approved executive compensation and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm. These decisions, made at the 2026 annual meeting on April 22, 2026, signify strong investor confidence in the company's current governance, oversight, and executive pay practices. Analysts currently rate LTH as a "Buy" with a price target of $38.00, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as "Neutral" due to improving profitability and strong cash flow balanced against leverage and technical softness.

feed.title: United Therapeutics CEO Martine Rothblatt sells $5.48m in shares
feed.summary: Martine A. Rothblatt, CEO of United Therapeutics Corp, sold approximately $5.48 million worth of shares on April 22, 2026, following the exercise of stock options, as part of a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The company's stock is trading near its 52-week high, driven by strong fundamentals and promising advancements in its research and development pipeline. Recent analyst reports remain positive, with increased price targets due to the potential of its drug Tyvaso.

feed.title: Lake Shore Bancorp (LSBK) EVP reports tax withholding, maintains sizable share and option holdings
feed.summary: Lake Shore Bancorp's EVP, Jeffrey M. Werdein, reported a routine tax withholding of 302 shares at $15.85 each to cover a tax liability from restricted stock vesting. This was a non-market disposition, not a sale. Following this, Werdein retains significant direct and indirect holdings, including common shares, fully vested stock options for 23,132 shares, and various unvested restricted stock awards.

feed.title: Fastenal Shareholders Endorse Leadership, Reject Added Diversity Reporting
feed.summary: Fastenal Company shareholders re-elected their 11-member board of directors, re-appointed PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, and approved executive compensation and stock unit plans at their April 23, 2026 annual meeting. However, investors rejected a proposal for additional EEO-1 report disclosure on workforce diversity. This outcome signifies strong shareholder support for the current leadership and governance while indicating limited demand for expanded ESG reporting at this time.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Investors Back Board, Reject Voting Proposal
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) shareholders re-elected all directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor at their 2026 Annual Meeting. Investors also rejected a proposal for a majority voting standard for director elections, indicating continued support for the existing governance framework. Analysts currently rate CFG as a Buy with a $75.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst "Spark" rates it as Outperform due to solid profitability and balance-sheet strength, despite some weaknesses in cash flow and revenue.

feed.title: Lee Enterprises names Bekke CEO, Rinehults CFO permanently
feed.summary: Lee Enterprises has permanently appointed Nathan Bekke as President and Chief Executive Officer and Josh Rinehults as Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer, after they served in interim roles since February 2026. The appointments follow a comprehensive nationwide search, with both executives having extensive experience within the company and its acquired entities. The company's shares have surged 84% in the past six months, though an InvestingPro analysis suggests they may currently be overvalued.

feed.title: Barclays (DJP) offers contingent-coupon notes tied to worst-performing index
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering Callable Contingent Coupon Notes linked to the least performing of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and Dow Jones Industrial Average. These notes have a $1,000 denomination and pay a contingent coupon of $6.833 per $1,000 if each reference asset closes at or above its 50% Coupon Barrier on observation dates. Investors face principal loss if the least performing asset falls below a 50% barrier at maturity, and the notes are unsecured obligations subject to Barclays' credit risk and potential U.K. Bail-in Power.

feed.title: Barclays (DJP) launches AutoCallable notes linked to GOOGL and META (DJP)
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has priced an offering of AutoCallable Contingent Coupon Notes due November 1, 2027, linked to the performance of Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) and Meta Platforms, Inc. (META). These notes offer a contingent coupon of $52.75 per $1,000 principal amount if certain barrier conditions are met, but expose investors to potential principal loss if the least performing asset falls below 75% of its initial value. The offering highlights various risks, including the creditworthiness of Barclays and the potential exercise of U.K. bail-in powers.

feed.title: Barclays Bank PLC (DJP) issues 5‑year contingent‑interest Notes linked to 10‑yr CMT
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has priced 5-year contingent-interest Notes linked to the 10-year constant maturity Treasury (CMT) rate, with an issue date of April 29, 2026, and a maturity date of April 29, 2031. Interest will accrue at a stated contingent rate of 7.15% per annum only when the 10-year CMT rate is between 0.00% and 5.00%. The Notes are unsecured and unsubordinated obligations of Barclays, subject to its credit risk and potential U.K. Bail-in Power, and may be redeemed early by Barclays starting from the fourth interest payment date.

feed.title: Barclays PLUS (DJP) 300% leveraged note, $1,267.50 cap — DJP
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering Performance Leveraged Upside Principal-at-Risk securities (PLUS) tied to an equally weighted basket of four financial equities: American Express, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, and JPMorgan. These notes offer 300% leverage on upside performance up to a maximum payment of at least $1,267.50 per PLUS but carry full downside exposure, meaning investors could lose their entire principal investment. The PLUS are unsecured debt obligations of Barclays Bank PLC and are subject to the issuer's creditworthiness and potential exercise of U.K. Bail-in Power.

feed.title: VOO ETF Gains 0.8%
feed.summary: The VOO ETF experienced a gain of 0.8%. This brief information indicates a positive movement in the ETF's value.

feed.title: DEP Accepting Comments On Renewal Of An Air Quality Permit For 23 Diesel Generators At The Iron Mountain Underground Data Center In Butler County
feed.summary: The Department of Environmental Protection (DEP) is accepting comments on the renewal of an Air Quality Permit for 23 backup diesel generators at the Iron Mountain Information Management, Inc. data center in Cherry Township, Butler County. The public has until May 25 to submit comments or request a hearing. The permit changes include the incorporation of GP-9 Air Quality General Permit requirements.

feed.title: Edison International shareholders approve board nominees and key proposals
feed.summary: Edison International's shareholders have approved all eleven director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as their accounting firm, and approved executive compensation during their annual meeting. A proposal regarding equity retention failed to pass. Following the meeting, the board expanded to 12 members with the addition of M. Susan Hardwick as an independent director.

feed.title: Is CoStar Group, Inc. (CSGP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: CoStar Group, Inc. (CSGP) is discussed as a potentially good stock to buy, based on a bullish thesis highlighting its dominance in commercial real estate data and subscription-based model. Despite challenges from aggressive residential real estate expansion impacting costs, activist pressure has led to governance improvements and a share repurchase program. With projected revenue of $3.8 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $770 million in 2026, the company aims to stabilize profitability while maintaining growth in its core business, positioning it as a compelling investment opportunity.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) investors approve pay, auditor and special meeting change
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams shareholders have approved executive compensation, ratified Ernst & Young LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026, and elected nine directors. Additionally, shareholders approved a management proposal to amend the ability to call a special meeting to a 25% ownership threshold, while a separate shareholder proposal on special meeting rights was not approved. These decisions were made during the company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.
